items.title: Heavy Volume in Home Depot Call Options - Investors are Bullish on HD Stock
items.description: Home Depot stock has had a large volume of short-dated out-of-the-money (OTM) calls today. This can be seen in Barchart's Unusual Stock Options Activity Report. It could signal investors' bullish outlook on the stock.

items.title: Is Home Depot (HD) Undervalued After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
items.description: Home Depot (HD) has slipped about 7% over the past month and 13% in the past 3 months, drawing fresh attention from investors who are considering whether the recent pullback is opening up a reasonable entry point. See our latest analysis for Home Depot. Zooming out, the recent slide in Home Depot’s share price, now around $354.03, has taken the year to date share price return into negative territory.
